title: 2016-2020 Batch Placements
content: 2016-2020 Batch Placements Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2020 5.2 LPA Mean Salary 4.1 LPA Median Salary 28.0 LPA Highest Salary by Amazon 13.0 LPA 2nd Highest Salary by zscaler 12.5 LPA 3rd Highest Salary by Google Key Recruitments: 11 Cos. placed students with CTC between 8 & 28 Lacs (Amazon, ZScaler, Google, Byjus, LIDO & Infosys to name a few) {34 Students Placed} 12 Cos. placed students with CTC between 6 & 7.2 Lacs (ZS Associates, GreyB, DecisionPoint, Paxcom to name a few) {25 Students Placed} 27 Cos. placed students with CTC between 3 & 5.5 Lacs (Gemalto, Infosys, Cognizant, Genpact, Wipro, NTT Data, Ericsson to name a few) {339 Students Placed} PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT Solan Batch 2016-20 as on 6/March/2021 PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT, SOLAN 2016-20 Branch Total Participating Students No. of Absolute Offers % of Absolute Offers No. of Total Offers % of Total Offers CSE 143 131 92% 239 167% ECE 74 73 99% 106 144% IT 22 21 95% 38 173% BT/BI 17 12 71% 12 71% CIVIL 27 11 41% 12 44% Total 283 248 88% 407 144% Key Recruiters: Click Labs Infosys TT Consultants Cogizant Kony Labs UniMrkt Coviam Technologies Kuliza Wep Digital Edoofa Kwench Wipro Ericsson Nineleaps Yamaha Motor Sol FICO NTT Data ZS Associates Gemalto Decision Point Zscaler Genpact Root Analysis Zycus Grappus RTDS Zyla Healthcare Hackwithinfi Sap labs IDS Infotech Hashdin SRM Contractors Eckovation HCL Stellarix Consultancy Extramarks India Lends The Smart Cube Collagedunia IndiaMart TresVista Ultratech Mountblue Bright Petroleum Growman Research Group Note:- Significant number of students who have opted for higher studies in India and abroad through GATE and other competitive examinations are removed from the list of total eligible students. For any query please write to pankaj.kumar@juit.ac.in
